response.justification: Strong polyglot full-stack engineer with ~16 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), but the resume shows no evidence of director-level technical leadership, no recognized AI products or platforms, no advanced AI/ML degree, and no track record advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption — all central to this Principal/Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: 16 years across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products at the level expected
No evidence of director-level IC influence or executive-facing advisory work
Lacks preferred advanced degree and large-scale cloud platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
No director-level leadership or strategic advisory track record
Sufficient years of engineering experience with recent AI-agent exposure
